name: Flowborn (Tank)

skills.name: Flow of the World
skills.description:
Can change Flow states at the Base to enhance stats.
Vitality: Increases max Health and Physical and Magical Defense.
Piercing Heart: Increases max Health and Physical Attack.
Haste: Increases max Health and Movement Speed.
Focus: Increases max Health and Cooldown Reduction.
Spend 1 stack of Flow to perform an enhanced Basic Attack and deal damage and gain recovery.

skills.name: Convergence
skills.description:
Channels the Flow, reducing the cooldown of other skills by 50%. Also gains 5–9 stacks of Flow based on the number of nearby heroes and minions and recovers Health based on Flow stacks.
Damages and knocks back nearby enemies (without applying crowd control).

skills.name: Power From Within
skills.description:
Charges at the target and slashes, dealing damage, launching enemies, and gaining a shield.
Using the skill continuously over a short time converts it to Clearing Slash and Rifting Slash.
If the skill is not on cooldown, spend 4 stacks of Flow to stop it from entering cooldown after use.

skills.name: All In
skills.description:
Leaps to the target location and attacks, dealing damage and launching enemies.
If the skill is not on cooldown, spend 5 stacks of Flow to stop it from entering cooldown after this use.

skillsZh.name: 萬物為流
skillsZh.description:
元流之子在泉水中可以切換「流」增強屬性。
生機：增加最大生命值和物理及法術防禦。
穿心：增加最大生命值和物理攻擊。
迅疾：增加最大生命值和移動速度。
凝神：增加最大生命值和冷卻時間縮減。
元流之子可消耗1層「流」強化普攻，額外造成傷害和回復。

skillsZh.name: 匯流為一
skillsZh.description:
元流之子匯集「流」，減少50%其他技能的冷卻時間，根據附近英雄和小兵數量獲得「流」，至少獲得5層，最多9層，根據「流」的層數回復生命值。
元流之子對近處的敵人造成傷害和擊退(無控制效果)。

skillsZh.name: 以身為引
skillsZh.description:
元流之子朝指定目標衝鋒並向前斬擊，造成傷害和擊飛，並獲得護盾。
短時間內連續施放會使技能轉為【撥雲式】和【斬壑式】。
若技能不在冷卻時間內，可消耗4層「流」施放技能，並使該次技能施放後不進入冷卻時間。

skillsZh.name: 傾注一擊
skillsZh.description:
元流之子向指定位置躍擊，造成傷害和擊退。
若技能不在冷卻時間內，可消耗5層「流」施放技能，並使該次技能施放後不進入冷卻時間。

tips: Build: Axe of Torment, Dragon's Rage, Spikemail.
tipsZh: 元流之子（對抗路）：梯度 A，勝率 48.17%（Camp HOK）。
出裝：暗影戰斧、怒龍劍盾、反傷刺甲.

faqs.question: Is Flowborn (Tank) good in current season?
faqs.answer: Flowborn (Tank) is Tier A Tank with 48.17% win rate, 0.77% pick rate, and 0.13% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Flowborn (Tank) build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Axe of Torment, Dragon's Rage, Spikemail, Frigid Charge, Destiny, Sage's Sanctuary.

faqs.question: How to counter Flowborn (Tank)?
faqs.answer: Pick Wukong, Musashi, Ying. Strong into Meng Ya, Luara, Garo.

faqsZh.question: 元流之子 這版本適合上分嗎？
faqsZh.answer: 元流之子 為 A 梯度，勝率 48.17%、選取 0.77%、禁用 0.13%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

faqsZh.question: 元流之子 出裝怎麼搭配？
faqsZh.answer: 推薦：暗影戰斧、怒龍劍盾、反傷刺甲、冰霜衝擊、名刀・司命、賢者的庇護.

faqsZh.question: 怎麼克制 元流之子？
faqsZh.answer: 可選 Wukong、Musashi、Ying。元流之子 克制 Meng Ya、Luara、Garo。

metaAnalysis: Counters: Meng Ya, Luara, Garo. Weak into: Wukong, Musashi, Ying.
metaAnalysisZh: 元流之子 勝率 48.17%（Camp HOK，2026-06-10）

guide.overview: Flowborn (Tank) is a Easy Tank (Clash Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier A with 48.5% win rate and 1.0% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Flowborn (Tank): Can change Flow states at the Base to enhance stats.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Meteor, Boots of Tranquility, Axe of Torment, then complete Nettle Gauntlet, Frostscar's Embrace, Longnight Guardian. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Fate, Penetration for stats that match Flowborn (Tank)'s Tank kit. Take Flash & Execute — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Convergence → Power From Within → All In → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → All In (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Max primary utility/damage skill first, then Convergence, and All In on cooldown.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Convergence → Power From Within → All In → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Clash Lane skirmish or objective fight

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Trade on your power spike levels (2/4). Call jungler for dive only when enemy flash is down.
guide.teamfight: Engage on enemy carry when your team has follow-up. Body-block skillshots for your marksman.
guide.highRank: Flowborn (Tank) is a viable Tier A pick in high rank with 48.5% win rate — strong in one-trick hands or as a counter-pick. Pick rate 1.0% — frequently seen in ranked; learn the matchup even if you do not main Flowborn (Tank). Below 49% global WR — high-rank players often avoid unless compensating for team comp.
comparisons: Flowborn (Tank) vs Kaizer (Tank, Tier S): Kaizer is 1.6% pick / 51.4% WR. Kaizer wins 2.9% more often globally. Choose Flowborn (Tank) when you need Clash Lane identity; choose Kaizer for Clash Lane comfort.
Flowborn (Tank) vs Dun (Tank, Tier S): Dun is 1.5% pick / 52.3% WR. Dun wins 3.8% more often globally. Choose Flowborn (Tank) when you need Clash Lane identity; choose Dun for Clash Lane comfort.

matchups.summary: Flowborn (Tank) excels into Meng Ya, Luara, Garo. Avoid blind picking into Wukong, Musashi, Ying without team peel.
